violations.text: Dish Machine pumps were not properly operating at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, bar 3 bay sink being used for proper washing/rinsing/sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The ice wells are lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Per the Plumber on site, ice well drains are to be adjusted for proper air gaps. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The door to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. Per the PIC, self-closer to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The floors in the storage room with the ice machine is constructed of wood, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. (Per the PIC, a plan is in place to add a new surface to the floor in the ice machine area.) New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
